info.title: Skyline.DataMiner.SDM.Tools
info.description: Command-line tool for Skyline DataMiner SDM that assists with one-time code generation tasks, primarily generating GUIDs for DOM entity definitions and scaffolding initial entity structures.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Generate common code to store data in a DataMiner system

commands.name: DomMapper
commands.description: Generates DataMiner Object Model DOM mapper classes based on the SDM attributes in the source code.

options.name: --ouputPath
options.description: The folder where the mappings should be saved.
